mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rn, A.* FROM ( SELECT p.prod_no AS productId, p.prod_nm AS productName, p.prod_type AS productType, p.tgt_lrg AS targetLarge, p.tgt_dtl AS targetDetail, TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.prod_desc, 1000, 1)) AS productDesc, p.rate_cat AS rateCategory, p.active AS isActive, p.reg_dt AS createdAt, p.min_prd_mon AS minPeriodMonth, p.max_prd_mon AS maxPeriodMonth, p.min_amt AS minAmount, p.max_amt AS maxAmount, p.app_start_dt AS appStartDate, p.app_end_dt AS appEndDate,
NVL(MIN(r.base_rate), 0) AS minRate, NVL(MAX(r.base_rate + NVL(r.pref_rate, 0)), 0) AS maxRate,
pc.currencyCode AS currencyCode, pc.currencyCodes AS currencyCodes
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN interest_rates r ON p.prod_no = r.prod_no AND r.is_active = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT prod_no, MIN(cur_cd) AS currencyCode, LISTAGG(cur_cd, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cur_cd) AS currencyCodes FROM product_currencies WHERE is_avail = 'Y' AND cur_cd <> 'KRW' GROUP BY prod_no ) pc ON p.prod_no = pc.prod_no
WHERE 1=1 AND p.active = 'Y' AND p.apv_stat_cd = '승인'
AND p.prod_type IN ('FOREIGN_DEP', 'FOREIGN_SAV')
AND p.rate_cat = #{rateCategory}
AND ( p.prod_nm LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR DBMS_LOB.INSTR(p.prod_desc, #{keyword}) > 0 )
AND p.prod_type = #{productType}
AND ( p.tgt_lrg = #{targetLarge} OR p.tgt_lrg = 'ALL' )
AND ( p.tgt_dtl = #{targetDetail} OR p.tgt_dtl = 'ALL' )
GROUP BY p.prod_no, p.prod_nm, p.prod_type, p.tgt_lrg, p.tgt_dtl, TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.prod_desc, 1000, 1)), p.rate_cat, p.active, p.reg_dt, p.min_prd_mon, p.max_prd_mon, p.min_amt, p.max_amt, p.app_start_dt, p.app_end_dt, pc.currencyCode, pc.currencyCodes
ORDER BY maxRate DESC
ORDER BY p.prod_nm ASC
ORDER BY p.reg_dt DESC
) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{startRow}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.prod_no AS productId, p.prod_nm AS productName, p.prod_type AS productType, p.tgt_lrg AS targetLarge, p.tgt_dtl AS targetDetail, TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.prod_desc, 1000, 1)) AS productDesc, p.rate_cat AS rateCategory, p.min_prd_mon AS minPeriodMonth, p.max_prd_mon AS maxPeriodMonth, p.min_amt AS minAmount, p.max_amt AS maxAmount, p.app_start_dt AS appStartDate, p.app_end_dt AS appEndDate,
NVL(MIN(r.base_rate), 0) AS minRate, NVL(MAX(r.base_rate + NVL(r.pref_rate, 0)), 0) AS maxRate,
pc.currencyCode AS currencyCode, pc.currencyCodes AS currencyCodes
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN interest_rates r ON p.prod_no = r.prod_no AND r.is_active = 'Y'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT prod_no, MIN(cur_cd) AS currencyCode, LISTAGG(cur_cd, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cur_cd) AS currencyCodes FROM product_currencies WHERE is_avail = 'Y' AND cur_cd <> 'KRW' GROUP BY prod_no ) pc ON p.prod_no = pc.prod_no
WHERE p.active = 'Y' AND p.apv_stat_cd = '승인'
AND p.prod_type IN ('FOREIGN_DEP', 'FOREIGN_SAV')
AND p.rate_cat = #{rateCategory}
AND ( p.tgt_lrg = #{targetLarge} OR p.tgt_lrg = 'ALL' )
AND ( p.tgt_dtl = #{targetDetail} OR p.tgt_dtl = 'ALL' )
GROUP BY p.prod_no, p.prod_nm, p.prod_type, p.tgt_lrg, p.tgt_dtl, TO_CHAR(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.prod_desc, 1000, 1)), p.rate_cat, p.min_prd_mon, p.max_prd_mon, p.min_amt, p.max_amt, p.app_start_dt, p.app_end_dt, pc.currencyCode, pc.currencyCodes
ORDER BY maxRate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT prod_no AS productId, active AS isActive, prod_nm AS productName, prod_type AS productType, tgt_lrg AS targetLarge, tgt_dtl AS targetDetail, prod_desc AS productDesc, min_amt AS minAmount, max_amt AS maxAmount, min_prd_mon AS minPeriodMonth, max_prd_mon AS maxPeriodMonth, int_pay_type AS interestPaymentType, apld_exch_type AS appliedExchangeRateType, app_start_dt AS appStartDate, app_end_dt AS appEndDate, rate_cat AS rateCategory, apv_stat_cd AS approveStatus FROM products WHERE prod_no = #{productId} AND active = 'Y' AND apv_stat_cd = '승인'

SELECT prod_cur_no AS productCurrencyId, prod_no AS productId, cur_cd AS currencyCode, cur_nm AS currencyName, is_avail AS isAvailable FROM product_currencies WHERE prod_no = #{productId} AND is_avail = 'Y' ORDER BY cur_cd

SELECT rate_no AS rateId, prod_no AS productId, cur_cd AS currencyCode, cust_type AS customerType, res_type AS residencyType, prd_mon AS periodMonth, base_rate AS baseRate, pref_rate AS preferentialRate, base_rate + NVL(pref_rate, 0) AS maxRate, mtr_rate AS maturityRate, early_cxl_rate AS earlyCancelRate, rate_start_dt AS rateStartDate, rate_end_dt AS rateEndDate, is_active AS isActive, rate_type AS rateType FROM interest_rates WHERE prod_no = #{productId} AND is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY cur_cd, prd_mon ASC

SELECT p.pref_rate_no AS prefRateId, p.rate_no AS rateId, p.cond_type AS conditionType, p.cond_desc AS conditionDesc, p.pref_rate AS prefRate FROM preferential_rate_conditions p JOIN interest_rates r ON p.rate_no = r.rate_no WHERE r.prod_no = #{productId} AND r.is_active = 'Y' ORDER BY p.pref_rate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_currencies ( prod_cur_no, prod_no, cur_cd, cur_nm, avail, reg_dt ) VALUES ( product_currencies_seq.NEXTVAL, #{product_id}, #{cur_cd}, #{cur_nm}, 'Y', SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT prod_cur_no AS prod_cur_no, prod_no AS product_id, cur_cd AS cur_cd, cur_nm AS cur_nm, avail AS avail, reg_dt AS reg_dt, updated_at AS updated_at FROM product_currencies WHERE prod_no = #{product_id} ORDER BY cur_cd
mapper.update: UPDATE product_currencies SET avail = 'N', updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE prod_cur_no = #{prod_cur_no}
